category_sources: Official skarnet page describes s6-rc as a service manager for s6-based systems.
source_facts.description says it is a process supervision suite.
display_name_sources: Official skarnet documentation page title is s6-rc.
docs_sources: Official skarnet s6-rc page includes overview, installation, and command reference links.
repo_sources: Official cgit page provides clone URLs for the skarnet s6-rc repository.
Official skarnet download section links the s6-rc git repository.
tags_sources: Official skarnet page describes starting and stopping services in dependency order for s6 systems.
